incorrect_answers: Start from thermodynamic consistency and skip checking constraints.
Use chemical equilibrium as a shortcut and avoid interpretation.
Pick vector interpretation by intuition and finalise without verification.

results.question: Choose the most defensible correction for this claim in "Coordinate Geometry and Calculus Basics": "Coordinate Geometry and Calculus Basics application works without constraints."
results.correct_answer: Coordinate Geometry And Calculus Basics Application works only when chapter-specific constraints and definitions are satisfied.
incorrect_answers: Vector Interpretation removes the need for all constraints in every case.
